concerns.text: SC-008 refers to 'crossing number ties' but crossing number is an invariant of the knot itself, not a variable property. FR-013 clarifies this means 'when multiple diagram representations exist' for a knot. Terminology should be consistent to avoid implying crossing number varies within a knot class.

FR-005 requires VIF assessment for multicollinearity (braid index ≤ crossing number), and FR-008 acknowledges discrete integer-valued invariants. However, no sample size/power analysis is specified for regression with ~10,000 knots. With many knots concentrated at crossing number 13, the effective sample size for lower crossing numbers may be insufficient for stratified analysis by alternating/non-alternating class.
